scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/backend" "npm run dev -w apps/landing" "npm run dev -w apps/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/backend && npm run build -w apps/landing && npm run build -w apps/frontend
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p apps/backend && tsc --noEmit -p apps/frontend/tsconfig.app.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/landing/tsconfig.app.json
